# TowerControl

## Tags
airport, travel, tower, transportation, lighthouse

## Categories
travel, transportation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/tower-control)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TowerControl;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TowerControl { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
